detectors.description:
UnsafeToken.lottery(uint256) (../data/audit/UnsafeToken.sol#116-125) uses a dangerous strict equality:
	- guess == random (../data/audit/UnsafeToken.sol#124)

UnsafeToken.timeLock() (../data/audit/UnsafeToken.sol#110-113) uses a dangerous strict equality:
	- block.timestamp % 2 == 0 (../data/audit/UnsafeToken.sol#112)

Contract locking ether found:
	Contract UnsafeToken (../data/audit/UnsafeToken.sol#9-142) has payable functions:
	 - UnsafeToken.receive() (../data/audit/UnsafeToken.sol#139-141)
	But does not have a function to withdraw the ether
detectors.markdown:
Contract locking ether found:
	Contract [UnsafeToken](../data/audit/UnsafeToken.sol#L9-L142) has payable functions:
	 - [UnsafeToken.receive()](../data/audit/UnsafeToken.sol#L139-L141)
	But does not have a function to withdraw the ether
